message.content:
<deliberation>
Approach:
- Parsed each main REG node and checked for explicit cross-references. Only REG-006 (Art9(4)) references Art9(2)(d), provided as REG-004; included it in considered_references. REG-031 and REG-056 contain no explicit cross-references in the provided text.
- Compared the combined regulatory requirements to the entire policy chunk to identify contradictions, alterations, or negations. Per instructions, omissions were treated as Non-Deviation.
Findings summary:
- REG-031 (Art13(7)(vi)): The policy chunk does not discuss input data specifications or training/validation/testing datasets. No contradictory statements found; omissions treated as Non-Deviation.
- REG-006 (Art9(4) + Art9(2)(d)): The policy discusses oversight evaluations and release criteria but does not contradict the need to consider combined effects of requirements in risk management. No explicit contradiction or narrowing detected.
- REG-056 (Art60(2)): The policy requires certain evaluations on a near-release version but does not prohibit or negate providers’ ability to conduct real-world testing before placing on the market or in partnership with deployers. No explicit contradiction found.
</deliberation>
